name: Jean's Sauerkraut Hotdish
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine pork and onion in a medium saucepan. Add water to cover.
2. Bring to boil and cook until pork is no longer pink. Cooking time will vary depending on the kind of meat used.
3. Remove meat and onion from the pot and cool slightly. Reserve liquid. Set onions aside.
4. Debone pork and cut into pieces.
5. Mix sauerkraut with reserved pork, onions, soup, and noodles.
6. Gradually add liquid used to cook pork until mixture has consistency of heavy stew.
7. Spoon into a 2-quart baking dish.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 30-45 minutes or until heated through.
